name: GDPR — General Data Protection Regulation
structural_limitations: GDPR's consent management (Art. 6-7), data subject rights (Art. 15-20), DPO requirements (Art. 37-39), and automated decision-making (Art. 22) are organizational/process requirements that do not map to NIST 800-53 technical controls. em-dash covers the technical security subset (19 of 99 GDPR articles) mapped through 800-53.
note: Maps GDPR articles to NIST 800-53 controls. GDPR has privacy-specific requirements (consent, right to erasure) that don't map cleanly to 800-53 security controls — those are marked as interview-only.
